# LLO Manager Guide — CRISPR-Test-001

> Synthetic training material stub. Written by `training-materials` skill. Used by `llo-onboarding` and `ocs-agent-setup` for RAG knowledge.

## Overview

This guide helps LLO managers oversee the CHW Training Pilot in TestLand's Eastern Province. It covers FLW onboarding, progress monitoring, and escalation procedures.

## FLW Onboarding Checklist

1. Verify FLW has a compatible Android device
2. Install CommCare from Google Play Store
3. Log in with provided credentials (domain: `crispr-test`)
4. Complete all 3 Learn app training modules (80% passing score required)
5. Confirm Deliver app is unlocked after training completion

## Monitoring Responsibilities

- Review FLW submission rates weekly (target: 80% of beneficiaries visited on schedule)
- Flag FLWs with <50% submission rate for additional support
- Escalate data quality issues to Ace-AI@Dimagi.com

## Escalation Contacts

- Technical issues: Ace-AI@Dimagi.com
- Clinical concerns: District Health Office
- Payment questions: Connect support via opportunity page
